story_set.title: I Had a Dream
story_set.colors: Christian Lichtner (credited as Chris Lichtner); Aron Lusen (credited)
story_set.letters: Richard Starkings (credited); Kolja Fuchs of Comicraft (credited as Comicraft/KF)
story_set.first_line: I wanted you to see this, Charles.
story_set.characters: Angel [Warren Worthington III] (cameo); Bastion [Sebastion Gilberti] (villain); Beast [Hank McCoy] (cameo); Bishop [Lucas Bishop] (Earth-1191) (cameo); Boomer [Tabitha Smith] (cameo); Cable [Nathan Summers] (cameo); Colossus [Piotr Rasputin] (cameo); Cyclops [Scott Summers] (cameo); Dazzler [Alison Blaire] (cameo); Jean Grey (cameo); Havok [Alex Summers] (cameo); Howard the Duck (Howard the Duck's original homeworld - Earth-47920) (cameo); Iceman [Bobby Drake] (cameo); Stan Lee (The real world - Earth-1218) (guest); Leech (cameo); Artie Maddicks (cameo); Magneto [Erik Lehnsherr] (villain); Nightcrawler [Kurt Wagner] (cameo); Carlos Pacheco (guest); Professor X [Charles Xavier]; Quicksilver [Pietro Maximoff] (guest); Rogue [Anna Marie] (cameo); Scarlet Witch [Wanda Maximoff] (guest); Tabitha Smith; Spider-Man [Peter Parker] (cameo); Strong Guy [Guido Carosella] (cameo); Sunspot [Roberto Da Costa] (cameo); Amelia Voght (guest); Wolverine [Logan] (cameo); Marvel Bullpen (cameo)
story_set.synopsis: Stan introduces a past tale of Xavier and Magneto meeting in a concentration camp to discuss the future of mutants everywhere.

story_set.notes: Letters from readers: Sandra Esteves, Amelia Thompson, Anthony Buchanan; Fred Stockton, and Steve Hites.

story_set.title: Operation Zero Tolerance Interview
story_set.notes: Preview of upcoming Operation Zero Tolerance storyline.
